summary: Iteration 7 testing complete. All 48 backend tests pass (100%) including 5 new tests for /api/hardware endpoint. All UI tests pass: 7 tabs render, 3D panel light theme (#F8FAFC) verified, Settings hardware sensors shows SIM badges for all 5 sensors, simulator sliders and reset button work, Docs tab shows 11-step install guide and GPIO wiring table with 4 sensors.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/hardware returns correct schema with i2c_available, spi_available, uart_available, sensors object with 5 entries
Hardware endpoint returns all required fields for each sensor (detected, model, mode, bus, address)
WebSocket telemetry includes sensor_modes field - verified via Settings tab showing SIM badges
Dashboard tab: 3D drone panel renders with almost-white background (#F8FAFC / rgb(248, 250, 252))
Dashboard tab: 3D panel shows motor bars (M1-M4), ALT altitude display, RPY values
Settings tab: Hardware Sensors section shows SIM badges for all 5 sensors (IMU, Baro, GPS, Rangefinder, Optical Flow)
Settings tab: All 6 simulator sliders work (wind_speed, wind_direction, sensor_noise, battery_drain, mass_kg, drag_coeff)
Settings tab: Reset button restores defaults (wind_speed returns to 0)
All 7 tabs render correctly (Dashboard, Telemetry, Camera/VO, MAVLink, Events, Docs, Settings)
Docs tab: Pi Zero Install section shows 11 steps with command blocks
Docs tab: Wiring/GPIO section shows GPIO table with 4 sensors (MPU6050, BMP280, GPS, PMW3901) and ASCII pinout
Events tab: Event log is scrollable with TIME, PRI, TYPE, MESSAGE columns
Tab navigation works correctly - all 7 tabs switch content properly
All 48 backend pytest tests pass (43 existing + 5 new hardware tests)
critical_code_review_comments: New /api/hardware endpoint correctly returns sensor detection status with proper schema
sensor_modes in WebSocket payload correctly shows 'simulation' for all sensors in this environment
SettingsTab.js correctly displays HW/SIM badges from sensorModes prop
Drone3DPanel.js has correct light background (#F8FAFC) with detailed drone model
DocumentationTab.js properly implements 6 subsections including GPIO wiring guide with 4 sensors
Console warnings about chart dimensions are cosmetic and don't affect functionality

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 48 API tests pass (43 existing + 5 new hardware tests)
